case_title: STEPHEN BRUCE BLEY, INC. DBA BLEY AND BLEY VS UCHIDA, MEGUMI D.C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,033.00 FILED BY STEPHEN BRUCE BLEY, INC. DBA BLEY AND BLEY AS TO DEFENDANT UCHIDA, MEGUMI D.C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
